definition: The part of the body of an animal or human which contains the brain, mouth and main sense organs.
example: Be careful when you pet that dog on the head; it may bite.
exampleVi: Hãy cẩn thận khi bạn vuốt ve đầu con chó đó; nó có thể cắn.

definition: The front part of the head of a human or other animal, featuring the eyes, nose and mouth, and the surrounding area.
example: That girl has a pretty face.
exampleVi: Cô gái đó có khuôn mặt xinh đẹp.

definition: An organ through which animals see (perceive surroundings via light).
example: Bright lights really hurt my eyes.
exampleVi: Ánh đèn sáng thực sự làm tôi đau mắt.

definition: The organ of hearing, consisting of the pinna, auditory canal, eardrum, malleus, incus, stapes and cochlea.
example: We need to understand the concept of ear.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tai.

definition: A protuberance on the face housing the nostrils, which are used to breathe or smell.
example: She has a cold in the nose.
exampleVi: Cô ấy bị cảm lạnh ở mũi.

definition: The opening of a creature through which food is ingested.
example: "Open your mouth and say 'aah'," directed the doctor.
exampleVi: "Mở miệng ra và nói 'aah'," bác sĩ hướng dẫn.

definition: A hard, calcareous structure present in the mouth of many vertebrate animals, generally used for eating.
example: We need to understand the concept of tooth.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về răng.

definition: The part of the body connecting the head and the trunk found in humans and some animals.
example: Giraffes have long necks.
exampleVi: Hươu cao cổ có cổ dài.

definition: The part of an animal's body between the base of the neck and forearm socket.
example: We need to understand the concept of shoulder.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về vai.

definition: The portion of the upper human appendage, from the shoulder to the wrist and sometimes including the hand.
example: She stood with her right arm extended and her palm forward to indicate “Stop!”
exampleVi: Cô ấy đứng với cánh tay phải mở rộng và lòng bàn tay hướng về phía trước để ra hiệu “Dừng lại!”

definition: The part of the forelimb below the forearm or wrist in a human, and the corresponding part in many other animals.
example: Her hands are really strong.
exampleVi: Bàn tay của cô ấy thực sự rất khỏe.

definition: A slender jointed extremity of the human hand, exclusive of the thumb.
example: Humans have two hands and ten fingers. Each hand has one thumb and four fingers.
exampleVi: Con người có hai bàn tay và mười ngón tay. Mỗi bàn tay có một ngón cái và bốn ngón.

definition: A limb or appendage that an animal uses for support or locomotion.
example: {{ux|en|Insects have six legs.}
exampleVi: {{ux|vi|Côn trùng có sáu chân.}

definition: A biological structure found in many animals that is used for locomotion and that is frequently a separate organ at the terminal part of the leg.
example: A spider has eight feet.
exampleVi: Một con nhện có tám chân.

definition: Each of the five digits on the end of the foot.
example: We need to understand the concept of toe.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ngón chân.

definition: A muscular organ that pumps blood through the body, traditionally thought to be the seat of emotion.
example: We need to understand the concept of heart.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về trái tim.

definition: The control center of the central nervous system of an animal located in the skull which is responsible for perception, cognition, attention, memory, emotion, and action.
example: We need to understand the concept of brain.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bộ não.

definition: A biological organ of vertebrates that controls breathing and oxygenates the blood.
example: We need to understand the concept of lung.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phổi.

definition: An organ in animals that stores food in the process of digestion.
example: We need to understand the concept of stomach.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về dạ dày.

definition: A composite material consisting largely of calcium phosphate and collagen and making up the skeleton of most vertebrates.
example: We need to understand the concept of bone.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về xương.

definition: A member of the Los Angeles gang The Bloods.
example: We need to understand the concept of blood.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về máu.

definition: The state of being free from physical or psychological disease, illness, or malfunction; wellness.
example: Her mental health is really affected by stressful environments.
exampleVi: Sức khỏe tinh thần của cô thực sự bị ảnh hưởng bởi môi trường căng thẳng.

definition: (often pluralized) Trouble; distress; misfortune; adversity.
example: Music won't solve all the world's ills, but it can make them easier to bear.
exampleVi: Âm nhạc không giải quyết được mọi bệnh tật trên thế giới nhưng nó có thể khiến chúng dễ chịu đựng hơn.

definition: Sick people in general as a group.
example: We have to cure the sick.
exampleVi: Chúng ta phải chữa bệnh.

definition: An abnormal condition of a human, animal or plant that causes discomfort or dysfunction; distinct from injury insofar as the latter is usually instantaneously acquired.
example: The tomato plants had some kind of disease that left their leaves splotchy and fruit withered.
exampleVi: Cây cà chua bị một loại bệnh nào đó khiến lá bị lấm lem và quả bị héo.

definition: An ache or bodily suffering, or an instance of this; an unpleasant sensation, resulting from a derangement of functions, disease, or injury by violence; hurt.
example: I had to stop running when I started getting pains in my feet.
exampleVi: Tôi phải ngừng chạy khi bắt đầu thấy đau ở chân.

definition: An emotional or psychological humiliation or bad experience.
example: how to overcome old hurts of the past
exampleVi: cách vượt qua nỗi đau cũ trong quá khứ

definition: A method, device or medication that restores good health.
example: We need to understand the concept of cure.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chữa bệnh.

definition: A physician; a member of the medical profession; one who is trained and licensed to heal the sick or injured. The final examination and qualification may award a doctor degree in which case the post-nominal letters are D.O., DPM, M.D., DMD, DDS, in the US or MBBS in the UK.
example: If you still feel unwell tomorrow, see your doctor.
exampleVi: Nếu ngày mai bạn vẫn cảm thấy không khỏe, hãy đến gặp bác sĩ.

definition: A wet nurse.
example: We need to understand the concept of nurse.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm y tá.

definition: One who performs surgery; a doctor who performs operations on people or animals.
example: The surgeon refused to operate because the patient was her son.
exampleVi: Bác sĩ phẫu thuật từ chối phẫu thuật vì bệnh nhân là con trai bà.

definition: The art of studying the different parts of any organized body, to discover their situation, structure, and economy.
example: We need to understand the concept of anatomy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giải phẫu.

definition: A substance given to stimulate the body's production of antibodies and provide immunity against a disease without causing the disease itself in the treatment, prepared from the agent that causes the disease (or a related, also effective, but safer disease), or a synthetic substitute.
example: We need to understand the concept of vaccine.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về vắc xin.

definition: A thin fabric with a loose, open weave.
example: We need to understand the concept of gauze.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về gạc.

definition: A strip of gauze or similar material used to protect or support a wound or injury.
example: We need to understand the concept of bandage.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm băng bó.

definition: One who, or that which, stretches.
example: We need to understand the concept of stretcher.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cáng.

definition: The state of being insusceptible to something; notably:
example: We need to understand the concept of immunity.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm miễn dịch.

definition: An emergency vehicle designed for transporting seriously ill or injured people to a hospital.
example: We need to understand the concept of ambulance.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm xe cứu thương.

definition: A membranous envelope.
example: We need to understand the concept of capsule.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm viên nang.

definition: The act or process of regaining or repossession of something lost.
example: We need to understand the concept of recovery.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phục hồi.

definition: Any substance that inhibits the growth and reproduction of microorganisms. Generally includes only those that are used on living objects (as opposed to disinfectants) and aren't transported by the lymphatic system to destroy bacteria in the body (as opposed to antibiotics).
example: We need to understand the concept of antiseptic.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thuốc sát trùng.

definition: A chair mounted on large wheels for the transportation or use of a sick or disabled person.
example: We need to understand the concept of wheelchair.

definition: A device to assist in motion as a cane, especially one that provides support under the arm to reduce weight on a leg.
example: He walked on crutches for a month until the cast was removed from his leg.
exampleVi: Anh ấy đã phải chống nạng đi lại trong một tháng cho đến khi chân của anh ấy được tháo bó bột.

definition: An amount of expenses that must be paid out of pocket before an insurer will pay further expenses.
example: We need to understand the concept of deductible.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khấu trừ.

definition: A person trained and skilled in examining and testing the eyes for defects, in order to prescribe corrective lenses or treatment.
example: We need to understand the concept of optometrist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bác sĩ đo thị lực.

definition: A medical doctor specializing in psychiatry.
example: We need to understand the concept of psychiatrist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bác sĩ tâm thần.

definition: A physician who specializes in pediatrics; a children’s doctor or babies’ doctor.
example: We need to understand the concept of pediatrician.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bác sĩ nhi khoa.

definition: A doctor or scientist who practices or specializes in neurology.
example: We need to understand the concept of neurologist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhà thần kinh học.

definition: A patient whose treatment needs at least one night's residence in a hospital; a hospitalized patient.
example: We need to understand the concept of inpatient.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bệnh nhân nội trú.

definition: A medical doctor who specializes in dentistry.
example: We need to understand the concept of dentist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nha sĩ.

definition: A patient who receives treatment at a hospital or clinic but is not admitted overnight; a receiver of ambulatory care.
example: We need to understand the concept of outpatient.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bệnh nhân ngoại trú.

definition: A physician who specializes in medical problems related to the heart.
example: We need to understand the concept of cardiologist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bác sĩ tim mạch.

definition: A person who is skilled in, professes or practices dermatology.
example: We need to understand the concept of dermatologist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm bác sĩ da liễu.

definition: The branch of medicine concerned with tumors, including study of their development, diagnosis, treatment, and prevention.
example: We need to understand the concept of oncology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về ung thư.

definition: A branch of biology that deals with the functions and activities of life or of living matter (as organs, tissues, or cells) and of the physical and chemical phenomena involved.
example: We need to understand the concept of physio.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vật lý.

definition: The use of radioactive substances in diagnosis and treatment.
example: We need to understand the concept of radiology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về X quang.

definition: The branch of medicine that subjectively diagnoses, treats, and studies mental disorders and behavioural conditions.
example: We need to understand the concept of psychiatry.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tâm thần học.

definition: An old person.
example: We need to understand the concept of geriatric.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lão khoa.

definition: The branch of medicine concerned with the study of the nature of disease and its causes, processes, development, and consequences.
example: We need to understand the concept of pathology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bệnh lý.

definition: The branch of medicine that deals with the disorders of nervous system including the brain and spinal cord of the central nervous system and the nerves, muscles, and neuromuscular junction of the peripheral nervous system.
example: We need to understand the concept of neurology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thần kinh học.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word orthopedist.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ orthopedist.

definition: The art and science of vision and eye care.
example: We need to understand the concept of optometry.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đo thị lực.

definition: The visual output an electrocardiograph produces
example: We need to understand the concept of cardiogram.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về điện tâm đồ.

definition: Chiropody
example: We need to understand the concept of podiatry.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về podiatry.

definition: Of or pertaining to pediatrics, the branch of medicine dealing with the care and treatment of children.
example: The hospital has established a pediatric intensive care unit.
exampleVi: Bệnh viện đã thành lập khoa chăm sóc tích cực nhi khoa.

definition: The study of the skin and its diseases
example: We need to understand the concept of dermatology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm về da liễu.

definition: A system of health care involving manipulation of the spinal column and other body structures, for the purpose of alleviating neuromusculoskeletal dysfunction.
example: We need to understand the concept of chiropractic.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về chỉnh hình.

definition: Therapy that uses physical techniques such as massage, ultrasound, heat, and exercise
example: We need to understand the concept of physiotherapy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vật lý trị liệu.

definition: To deprive of the ability to procreate.
example: We need to understand the concept of sterilize.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khử trùng.

definition: A substance that kills germs and/or viruses.
example: The scalpels were soaked in disinfectant before the operation so disease wouldn't be spread.
exampleVi: Dao mổ được ngâm trong chất khử trùng trước khi phẫu thuật để bệnh không lây lan.

definition: Agent noun of sanitize; one who sanitizes; a product that provides a sanitized result (e.g. a hand sanitizer).
example: We need to understand the concept of sanitizer.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chất khử trùng.

definition: Inoculation with a vaccine, in order to protect from a particular disease or strain of disease.
example: We need to understand the concept of vaccination.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiêm chủng.

definition: The introduction of an antigenic substance or vaccine into the body to produce immunity to a specific disease.
example: We need to understand the concept of inoculation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiêm chủng.
